nodes.name: 🔔 Webhook — Receive Blog to Publish
nodes.notes: Called by 09A after content is generated. Receives full blog post object + Pinterest pins + brand data.

nodes.name: ⚙️ Prep Blog for Publishing
nodes.notes: Converts llama3 blog output into WordPress Gutenberg block format and Ghost HTML format. Builds FAQ schema JSON-LD. Prepares Yoast/RankMath SEO meta fields.

nodes.name: 🎨 Generate Featured Image
nodes.notes: Generates the blog featured image at 1200x628 (Open Graph standard size). Also used as Pinterest pin image.

nodes.name: 📝 Publish to WordPress
nodes.notes: SETUP: WordPress REST API. Authentication: HTTP Basic Auth with your WP username + Application Password (WP Admin → Users → Application Passwords). Replace YOUR_WORDPRESS_SITE_URL. Free WordPress hosting: wordpress.com, or self-hosted on your VPS.

nodes.name: 👻 Publish to Ghost (Alternative)
nodes.notes: ALTERNATIVE to WordPress. Ghost is cleaner, faster, better SEO out of the box. Free self-hosted or $9/month Ghost Pro. Get Admin API key from Ghost Admin → Integrations → Add Custom Integration. Use EITHER WordPress OR Ghost, not both.

nodes.name: ⚙️ Get Published Blog URL
nodes.notes: Extracts the live blog post URL from whichever CMS responded. Updates Pinterest pins with the real URL.

nodes.name: ⚙️ Split Pinterest Pins
nodes.notes: Splits 3 Pinterest pins into separate workflow items for parallel posting.

nodes.name: 📌 Post Pin to Pinterest
nodes.notes: Posts each pin to Pinterest. Each pin links to the blog post — this is the Pinterest → Blog → Store funnel. 3 pins per product = 3x chances to surface in Pinterest search.

nodes.name: 🔌 Humanize Meta Description
nodes.notes: Calls Workflow 05 to humanize the meta description. Good meta descriptions dramatically improve click-through rate from Google search results.

nodes.name: 📝 Update Meta with Humanized Version
nodes.notes: Updates the WordPress post with the humanized meta description. Improves CTR from search results.

nodes.name: 📊 Log to Blog_Library Sheet
nodes.notes: Logs every published blog post. Track rankings and traffic over time in this sheet.

nodes.name: 🔍 Ping Sitemap (RankMath)
nodes.notes: Pings RankMath SEO plugin to regenerate sitemap after new post. Also triggers auto-submission to Google if configured. Optional node — only needed with RankMath plugin.

meta.description: Workflow 09C: Blog Publisher. Converts llama3 blog content to WordPress Gutenberg blocks or Ghost HTML. Generates AI featured image (1200x628). Publishes post with full Yoast/RankMath SEO meta. Posts 3 Pinterest pins linking to blog. Humanizes meta description. Logs everything to Blog_Library sheet.
